ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the employee has */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary_grade" INTEGER /* Salary grade of the employee */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the employee */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date of termination if applicable */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the employee */,
  "visa_status" TEXT /* Visa status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or level of the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_periods" (
  "pay_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the pay period */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the pay period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pay period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pay period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pay period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the pay period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pay_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "pay_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pay period */,
  "regular_pay" REAL /* Amount of regular pay */,
  "overtime_pay" REAL /* Amount of overtime pay */,
  "other_pay" REAL /* Amount of other pay */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings for the pay period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the earnings */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate if the earnings are in a different currency */,
  "tax_deducted_at_source" REAL /* Amount of tax deducted at source */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay after deductions */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_pay_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("pay_period_id") REFERENCES pay_periods ("pay_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regular_pays" (
  "regular_pay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regular pay record */,
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earning record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of regular pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regular_pay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regular_pays_earning_id FOREIGN KEY ("earning_id") REFERENCES earnings ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overtime_pays" (
  "overtime_pay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overtime pay record */,
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earning record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of overtime pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overtime_pay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overtime_pays_earning_id FOREIGN KEY ("earning_id") REFERENCES earnings ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_pays" (
  "other_pay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other pay record */,
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earning record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of other pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_pay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_pays_earning_id FOREIGN KEY ("earning_id") REFERENCES earnings ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_records" (
  "tax_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earning record */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax withheld */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year of the tax record */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_earning_id FOREIGN KEY ("earning_id") REFERENCES earnings ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deductions" (
  "deduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deduction record */,
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earning record */,
  "deduction_name" TEXT /* Name of the deduction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the deduction */,
  "deduction_type" TEXT /* Type of deduction */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the deduction */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the deduction */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the deduction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deductions_earning_id FOREIGN KEY ("earning_id") REFERENCES earnings ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Description of the compliance requirement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance */,
  "date_verified" TEXT /* Date when compliance was verified */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance */,
  "next_verification_date" TEXT /* Date for the next verification */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who verified the compliance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
